text: With the increasing effects of man-made climate change, we are all invited to consider the role that healthcare plays in this phenomenon and how we can aﬀect improvements. A very relevant issue to consider is the contribution of medical imaging to total emissions and this article attempts to identiﬁes some of the challenges and provide examples of practical actions radiologists can perform to inspire change within their department.
explanation: Coherent, domain-specific content with small typographical quirks that can occur in human writing or OCR artifacts. These details do not provide a strong AI-generated signature.
